OPTIONAL_SUFFIX{0, 2}, copublisher:('ANSI' SLASH 'ASHRAE' (SLASH LETTER{3, 10}){0, 10}) SPACE type:TYPE? SPACE? CODE (SPACE?? DASH year:YEAR_DIGITS)? (SPACE ADDITIONAL_COPUBLISHER)? SUFFIX?
